message:
Fix delegation lookup and success semantics from code review

- Add call_id to Delegation type for correct multi-delegation matching
- Use Map<call_id, Delegation> instead of find() by agent name
- Fix success = !hitTurnLimit (stumbles are informational, not fatal)
- Remove dead learnSignals array (signals emitted individually via events)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
